name: integration_ph_launch_educato_app_personalized_ex
method: [PH LAUNCH] Educato App: Personalized exam prep, now in your pocket

phases.name: niche_discovery
steps: scrape PH edtech category for exam prep launches (last 90d)
extract certification niches + upvote signals as demand proxy

phases.name: market_sizing
steps: score each niche: exam candidate volume x avg study spend x IAP conversion
rank top 5 niches by revenue potential / build effort ratio

phases.name: asset_generation
steps: clone scripture-streak base template → rename for top niche (e.g. cpa-streak, mcat-streak)
generate 3 SEO longtail pages per niche: 'best [cert] exam prep app', '[cert] practice test app', '[cert] study app free'

phases.name: deploy_and_distribute
steps: queue 3 Reddit posts per niche sub (r/premed, r/LSAT, r/CPA, r/GRE)
add app to app factory build queue with priority score
